scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir dist && NODE_ENV=production webpack && cp dist/domo.js demo/domo.js
scripts.releaseAlpha: npm run build && npm publish --tag alpha
scripts.releaseBeta: npm run build && npm publish --tag beta
scripts.bumpAlpha: npm run build && npm run bump -- --prerelease alpha
scripts.bumpBeta: npm run build && npm run bump -- --prerelease beta
